name: The Dark Stone
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Bulletproof
granted_abilities.text: Reduce all damage dealt to this model by (gun) actions by 1.

granted_abilities.name: Forever Doomed
granted_abilities.text: This model treats any black jokers it flips or cheats as red jokers.

granted_abilities.name: Moon's Corruption
granted_abilities.text: This model's Fallow Night action gains the following trigger: (c) Moon's Corruption: Remove all non-Scheme markers within (pulse)1" of the made marker.

granted_actions.name: Piercing Darkness
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has half of its maximum health or less, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Arc
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again targeting a different model, drawing range and LoS from the original target.

triggers.name: Finality
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (fortitude) abilities.

extraction_notes: The 'Moon's Corruption' ability describes a trigger that is added to the model's existing 'Fallow Night' action, rather than granting a new action.
The Limitations section shows a dash '-', indicating no limitations.
Arc trigger specifies 'Once per activation' as a cost/restriction.
Bulletproof uses (fortitude) icon and Forever Doomed affects defensive mechanics but is not a standard defensive ability type.
